## Use these topics on GitHub via Settings вҶ’ Topics
# Web4 Protocol Stack

A modular, trust-native distributed intelligence framework for building next-generation internet systems.

This project explores a new architecture for the internet where context, identity, and value are first-class programmable primitives.

---

## рҹҡҖ Vision

Modern systems separate:
- Data
- Identity
- Intelligence
- Value

Web4 merges them into a unified trust-aware network where:
- Context is portable
- Identity is cryptographic and persistent
- Intelligence is distributed
- Value is natively embedded in interaction flows

---

## рҹ§  Core Concepts

### Linked Context Tokens (LCT)
Portable units of meaning that carry semantic state across systems and agents.

### Trust Tensors
Multi-dimensional reputation and credibility models used to evaluate agents, data, and actions.

### Compression Trust
Mechanism for validating information integrity through probabilistic and structural compression patterns.

### Memory Temporal Sensor
System for tracking evolving state across time in distributed environments.

### Lightchain
A lightweight distributed ledger optimized for context, not just transactions.

---

## рҹҸ— Architecture Layers

### 1. Identity Layer
- Decentralized identity primitives
- Reputation binding
- Persistent agent profiles

### 2. Intelligence Layer
- Distributed AI agents
- Context-aware reasoning
- Memory-linked inference systems

### 3. Protocol Layer
- MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- ACP (Agent Coordination Protocol)
- SAL governance rules
- Agency delegation framework

### 4. Value Layer (ATP Economy)
- Adaptive tokenized participation
- Reputation-weighted value flows
- Non-linear incentive systems

---

## рҹ”— Ecosystem Design

Web4 is built on composability:

- Agents communicate via structured context packets
- Systems evolve through interaction history
- Trust replaces static authentication
- Reputation replaces permissioning

---

## рҹ§© Key Modules

- r6-framework вҶ’ Core runtime orchestration layer
- synchronism вҶ’ Cross-agent coordination system
- dictionary-entities вҶ’ Semantic object registry
- fractal-architecture вҶ’ Recursive system scaling model

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Use Cases

- Decentralized AI networks
- Trust-based identity systems
- Autonomous governance frameworks
- Context-aware data marketplaces
- Self-evolving distributed applications

---

## рҹ“ң License

AGPL-3.0 (or compatible distributed open-source model)

---

## рҹҢҗ Status

Experimental / early-stage protocol research system.
